author: Ryan Estes
name: Recurrent 512 L3 6K (8x H100)
blurb: Shared-loop recurrent transformer (MODEL_DIM=512, NUM_LOOP_ITERS=3, MIN_LOOP_ITERS=1) trained for 6000 iterations on FineWeb SP1024 using 8x H100. Achieves stable convergence with sub-4 minute runtime well under the 10-minute constraint.
